title: Sylvan plan-overlap note
body: Post-close reground: Sylvan processed and closed claim 00588310 on the legacy shard plus plan/pass log. Shaded opened claim d78be60e on the critical-drain plan while my claim was active, so I will avoid further edits to that plan until Shaded closes or routes. Current strict-hard validation for my slice passed: SOFT (20 soft).
